name: GTS defense work
description:
it's your first day as a Giantess Defense Soldier! or a GDS... you will get to know more GDS like you or even human soldiers! who knows maybe you will get to made friends with a tiny human! all this while the country you live on has tension between countries and way too close to war encounters with the other's.

I just realized this is the real size of the GDS, and i give them to you if you were curious about it.

(this is a experiment, i don't know what i'm doing here. please tell me how i could improve this)
